name: Dalia Soveren
description: Druing the The Clone wars she was born into Alderaan nobility, however she fled the royal life at the age of 21, the young princess dennying her royal mandate as well as her responsability pursuing the life among the stars in love with the space, galaxy and piloting she's on her own, sometimes it feels lonely, especialy now the Empire risen from The republic after the destructive Clone Wars, fear gripping around them from the Emperors right hand, Lord Vader
creator: ReinhardEhrlich
